location_address: Ciro's Tavern, 42 Cherry St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Food was cooked perfectly, service was polite and prompt. Came by for a quick bite when our first option was closed. Low light bar atmosphere with large flat screen TVs. Draft beer and cocktail options. Apps were decently sized and very flavorful. Their pork nachos are amazing and the tortilla chips were crisp and crunchy!,I have been ordering the Lobster BLT from here for years and it has been great. Tonight, I ordered one and got far less than half the amount of lobster as usual. I called and asked if I could get the meal refunded and they declined. I won’t be coming back.,Had the baked haddock meal. Barely had 3 oz of fish. I looked like a childs portion, not an adults. The potatoes had more flavor  then the haddock. Not a dish I would ever order again there.
Also, I was shocked by the number of customers  coming and going with their dogs in tow. Granted they were on the outdoor patio, but several of these dogs barked  thru my entire visit.
Not as pleasant as it has been before.,They were so thoughtful. I had made a reservation for a party of 15 and I received a call before the time and was asked if anyone in the party would have an issue with stairs or high top stools. I was a good thing they called, because it would have been an issue, but they had the forethought to call! Also when we got there our server was wonderful, friendly and just a lot of fun. Joking with us and making us laugh and everyone was happy with the food they ordered!,What an amazing lunch!  Opted for the sandwich and soup combo.  Delicious lobster bisque had chunks of lobster that barely fit on the soup spoon!  Colleague was impressed with the burger and salad as well.  Fantastic food coupled with excellent service makes Ciro's a must visit when in town!,A fun engaging place set in an old castle like building.  Food & service was good.  Nice selection and fair prices.  Great for a group.  Near Theatre easy to take in a performance.,Visited for the first time for the Halloween event! It was awesome. Such a good vibe with people from 25-40. Great music. The sausage ricotta pizza was so good too. Friendly,fast service.,This is a must-visit if you're in the area. The atmosphere is super inviting and relaxing, the staff is amazing, and the food is tasty. Decent bar selection, also! The lunch specials are sandwiches, salads, flatbread, wraps, soups, and some entree options as well. Nice menu and good prices. Will definitely be back.

location_address: Michael's Food & Spirits, 493 Elm St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Loved it bartender was very attentive, locals were awesome, food was hot as hell and the onion petals were amazing great way to end the night for my group. Probably best spot we ended up at out of all the places we went.,Super amazing bartenders.  Nice easy atmosphere and pool tables for added fun!!!

Highly recommend the deep fried raviolis.,This is long overdue, I've been coming here for 4+ years now it least once bi-monthly and the owners are great people, they beyond know what they are doin'  The most I've spent on a drink was 10.50$(?) but that was a patron margarita, The food comes out hot... and punctual, I mean to the point I've had to wait to eat my food... because it was that hot. I don't think I can even say anything negative about  this place or anything or anytime I've been there.,Good bar food - garlic chicken boneless bites with blue cheese was yummy! Cheese fries were great too!,Fun, unassuming bar with fantastic drinks, pool tables, fun karaoke nights, a friendly & attentive staff & appetizers & meals that are worth the trip!  Casual atmosphere and a great place to relax & chill with friends.  My go-to drink is the Hippie Juice!  For food, the Irish Nachos could feed a small town in Ireland...or anywhere for that matter.  It is the best!  I highly recommend the cheesy fries & the buffalo bleu burger.,Tina is the most gracious host who always makes you feel welcome, remembers what you drin, and runs fun games Fri night.  Free pool tables and popcorn too.,Hadn't been there in a long time. Under new ownership. Looked nice indoors and food was great! Enjoyed my time there very much. A good reason to return!,Haven't been up in this area for 20 yrs. (Trying to lay ma to rest😌) Rough day....googled "liquor bar near me"......Stopped in and the bartender; TRACY (👋), and locals were so helpful. The Chicken Parm sandwich was to die for!!!! (LOVE my tator tots) I felt so welcomed! Would DEFINITELY recommend this place BUT, don't blink, you might miss it. (Everything's SO different up here, especially the buildings. Every place looks like a house!🤷🏼🤷🏼🤦) ABSOLUTELY HAVE TO STOP HERE😁😁😁

location_address: Kay's Restaurant, 1013 Cass Ave, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Atmosphere was so fun and refreshing!
The waitress was fantastic and my 80 year old parents loved the igloo experience and loved there warm and tasty generous lazanga dish ; and delicious chicken pot pie.
The waitress Michele was the best!
A must go !,First time...great food.  Outside seating was a wonderful experience.,I live out of state but was born in Woonsocket, so every time I come home to visit, I always go to Kay's!!
I was truly disappointed for the first time ever coming here.  The service was fabulous but the food was terrible.  I always order the steak sandwich and it is always amazing, but this time it was not.  I couldn't even see the steak unless I took the bread off, I got mushrooms and onions but if I had 5 of each I was lucky.  It was so disappointing.   Too much on the menu now, so what made this restaurant successful (steak sandwich!) has been kicked to the curb.
Pretty sure my days of going to Kay's when I come home to visit  are over.  So sad 😞 😔,This is a terrific spot for an old school bar scene with quality cocktails and maybe the best steak sandwich in New England if not the entire eastern seaboard!!! Lovely, competent bar and wait staff. Great menu .. besides the aforementioned steak sandwich .. with really good pricing.,my stuffed mushrooms was terrible, they had cheese Melted on top & oily did not say on menu, my server was careless,Simply stated, a great spot, nothing pretentious, just good solid food. Our bartender was very nice, had answers to all our questions. Try to go there every year and it never lets me down!,If your looking for a place to go with friendly staff and great food check this place out! Kay's has the igloos! Service is quick and friendly! Ask for the waitress Katelyn she was awesome! Recommended and posted the lasagna and woah that lobster grilled cheese was more like a mountain! Turkey sandwich and Ruben was loaded as well. Definately worth checking out!,I grew up at kays and got see all their changes. And this last one is by far the worse.  They are bringing in all new dishes and in doing so there signature sandwich the steak and cheese has gone to hell.  I’ve gotten way to many bad one than good ones now.  And at 12.75 it is so not worth it.   My trip there was by far the worse and it will be awhile before I go back.  I’ve told many and have taken many there for there sandwich, and now I have nothing good to say about them.
Kay would not be happy!!!!!

location_address: Thai Garden, 280 Main St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Great local Thai spot,  if you have not tried the Thai sausage you should.  Just remember this food has heat🔥🔥so if you have a delicate palate make sure you mentioned it before ordering...,went to just go pick up a side of sticky rice today for my girlfriend and upon entering i saw a baby roach crawling around on the check out counter. now can you imagine how it is in the back with all the food being made. absolutely disgusting. i tried to get a photo of the baby roach but my phone was in the car and by the time i ran to get it and came back in the roach was gone.,So I accidentally ordered a whole fish (Pla Jien, pictured) but it was delicious so it's all good! Chicken Satay, Shrimp Spring Rolls, and Squid Disco were all tasty appetizers, and the Beef Pad Thai was delicious as well. They're doing take out only for now, and I will definitely be back!,Nice hide away place.  Pho is definitely lao style.  Laab is good...chef can make it bitter or sour...the way you like it.  Sticky rice is like home made.  Definitely better than other thai/lao restaurants around.,Do yourself a favor and try the food before drawing conclusions. When you first walk in, you'll probably want to walk straight back out. The inside appearance doesn't do it justice. I've eaten many Thai dishes and this has been the most authentic Thai flavor I've had in years. Phenomenal. Can't wait to eat there again. But you might want to take it to go...,My family's favorite Thai restaurant. We pick up takeout at least once a week and often try new dishes. We are never disappointed. The owners/staff are friendly and it's nice to be a "regular" somewhere you feel seen.,Couldn't say enough how much I love this place.

Very authentic delicious Thai food!,Delicious fresh food with lots of flavors.
The portion could be better based on the price of the food.

location_address: Missy's Family Restaurant, 801 Clinton St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Small dinner peaceful  atmosphere  music playing softly. The food served 😋 if ever wanting  great serve this a good place to start your day,Was dropping my kid off at camp and decided to get some breakfast, was searching for some reviews and came across Missy's place. Really good homemade breakfast spot here in woonsocket. A definite must stop if you are in search for a local spot here, also maybe put on your breakfast trail of rhode island to visit the area also or passing thru.,First time going to this restaurant, and it was MORE than expected, the burger I had was delicious and full of flavor! The kids loved the food, 10/10 recommend! Will be back soon. Plus the waitress was really friendly.,Went for breakfast. Sat right down. Waitress promptly took our order. My wife and I both ordered omelets and an order of hash to share.

35 minutes went by since ordering and still no food. I was finally able to get the waitress's attention, who had walked by many times looking the other away, and I asked what the hold up was. She said 2 more minutes because corned beef hash takes forever. What?

So about 9 minutes later the food came out. My guess is they lost the order and didnt start it until we asked.

food was pretty good except the raisin toast (an up charge) was burned.
Owner stopped by with lots of excuses, but no adjustment to the $44 bill.

Never going back.,Nice little place pleasant staff, good food,I had the fried clams and they were really good..this place delivers Thanksgiving dinner to the disabled and elderly place that I live in..the Thanksgiving dinner is awesome too..thank you so much.,Food was delicious and staff was very friendly and attentive to us.  Absolutely returning for more!,I absolutely love this place. This is honestly my only go to breakfast spot. I try to go weekly. The food is excellent. Service is great. I always end up talking to the owner, she is just a sweet woman to chat with. Mostly family works there, and all are great. Sometimes when it's busy it's a little slower to get your food, but that's because they make everything to order, but definitely worth the wait. So glad I found this great place.

location_address: Al's Place, 134 Providence St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10: Great little local diner. Ton of food. You won't have to eat till dinner. Coffee is good. Had eggs and corned beef hash (pretty sure it was canned). It was good though. Wife and son had omelets, said they were very good. Son had a 3egg and couldn't finish it, and he's 15 years old and an athlete. Definitely will go back if/and/or when we come back.,This is another spot here in woonsocket that needs to be on your stop for breakfast. Was in woonsocket for the last couple days and was checking out the different local spots for breakfast. Eggs yes, bacon crispy ✔️,  perfect homefries 👍. Give this local business some love.,Uncle Al’s is by far the best breakfast place in Rhode Island. Very friendly, affordable, and massive portion sizes. I love uncle Al and Michelle. You guys are the best!!!,My husband and I tried Al's place today . Al's place has earned it's good reviews. The food was great and service even better. The place is small but we had no problem finding a seat. I found a new breakfast place and I recommend this place to anyone,Just moved to Woonsocket Al's is right down the street. Thought why not, give it a try. Well let's just say this place is a 10/10. 5 stars doesn't do it justice.  We go out for breakfast often, but the veggie omelette I had today. Was the best I have ever had. Huge plates!! Amazing customer service. Al and Angel are both great people. So friendly, so welcoming. Very clean restaurant that's family owned.  Bathroom is also very clean. This is definitely our new breakfast place! Highly recommended!,Amazing place. Perfect pancakes and eggs. Excellent food and amazing staff. 10/10. Great all around.,Came for breakfast. Wow so happy we did. This review wont be able to  give Al's enough justice. The pancakes where as big as the plate. I ordered the "he man" breakfast. Came with 2 bacon 2 sausage 2 toast 2 pancakes and 2 eggs and a huge pile of home fries for 9.99 . The quality of the food was amazing, the ammount was mind blowing. And the price is very reasonable for what you get and how great it is. My wife and I would suggest Al's place to Any and everyone. We are definitely customers for life. And the wonderful women who took our order and served us while we where here was also just as amazing. Very friendly and kind. She also packaged our food for us when we finished. Thanks guys! Keep up the amazing work. We have a phone that's 6.5 inches long and the pancake was about 1 and a half the size of my phone.. huugeeee.,Al and Michelle a perfect father and daughter team! Always welcoming every guest that walks in..

location_address: Brews & Cues, 42 Rathbun St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10: One of the best bars in the city, fast service & always free pool. Mariah and Aimee are the best bartenders as well! Love this place,A friend invited me to go here last night for a few drinks it was the worst experience ive had at a bar it took like 10 15 mins to get a drink in a bar with no more then 25 people bartender was very rude i guess if ur not a regular ur treated different and the drink cost 9 dollar and didnt even taste like any alcohol was in it not a spot id recommend to go and if u do go buy something in a bottle so u know ur getting some kind of alcohol,Always a good time Thursday through Saturday nights are the best popping with the best dressed and the who's who of Woonsocket are always in attendance Asia the bartender is not only beautiful and courteous, but she also knows her patrons well and engages in conversation with all of them, which results in wonderful tips might i add and customer retention,Clean, but a little crowded,Bar tenders all hot and fun to chat with an cold beer even watch fights ...alot of kool people ive met in there ....,One of my favorite bars! Great for every night!,Terryanne is a racist dirty bully Rhode Island huff bully pitbull,Love that BAHH.. THEY HAVE THE BEST BARTENDERS!

location_address: Barbara's Place, 77 N Main St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
I found a legit  neighborhood eatery that has it all. It's like everyone is both VIP & family. I wanted it all. I settled on steak and eggs and so glad I did. Juicy steak eggs with cheese and crispy home fries.
The cook delivers it to me and smiled and said " I hope you like it"
Amazing exchange I felt her genuine words. The place was 3/4 full and everyone was chill. I will be back,Nice cozy & friendly place with quick service. I had a Western Omelette with a side of Hash,Found this little place so refreshing to walk in and have the hometown feeling! The server Beth took great care of us. She bounced around the place and ya know she loves what she's doing! Looking forward to going back! Food is excellent. Oh, the wieners are the best!!,Food is good! You'll have a good variety to choose from. Service is great. You'll feel at home at this place. A must visit.,Friendly home atmosphere dinner.  Generous portion for the$ . The fish could use more seasonings or salt,Every  thing was delicious  just wish the poor waitress  had more help she ran around  like crazy  she was just so over whelmed  we waited  1 hour  for our breakfast  But the food  was delicious,Great little place.  Good prices n delicious food.,This place is awesome always great food really nice people  and Lynn our server was epic on point and very kind

location_address: Chelo's Hometown Bar & Grille, 490 Clinton St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
The staff and everything was great! The food and how they can accommodate almost any request is everything. A place that is truly flexible is amazing my mom and I asked to split a dish and they did it!! With beauty! Presentation was amazing!!!,So how to rate this place...
Food: wife and I had the fish and chips. It came with 1 big piece of cod, steak fries and slaw. The fish was really good. Very tasty and flaky but not over cooked. Breading was a bit greasy on the bottom where it sat on the plate. Would be better if they made it 2 pieces instead of 1. Slaw was blah but I've actually had worse. Fries were good. Son had a burger with curly fries and said it was very good.
Drinks: Yuck. Iced tea was instant not brewed.
Service: very nice waitress we had a nice talk and she shared some local barber shops and other things we are in need of before dropping our boy at Mount.
Overall, pretty darn good. And we didn't even get desert.
It was very loud in there and the country music was a bit much. But hey I don't spend my day in there so I only had to listen for a little bit.,Monday Night Celebration Dinner for the little one getting a medal in gymnastics!! We had Ninja as our server. She was absolutely amazing!!!! Her service was impeccable!!! We will be back again and will most definitely be requesting Ninja to wait on us!!!,Food was great and came hot, it doesn't take much to make me happy. Just my food come the way I ordered it and it did. The waitress was great very pleasant.,Worst customer service..ordered dozen clam cakes. I'm guessing they don't know a dozen is 12 not 6..called an claimed they were very ruid an not willing to compensate us after we paid for 12 bot 6..food is amazing but customer service Trash..keep cooks there 100% .get rid of servers an hostess,Always friendly service and great food! I had curried chickpeas a rice which was delicious! Nice to have seasonal changes, new and fresh.,The food was good but the air was blasting. Hard to enjoy a meal when so cold. Several people commented, waitress said nothing she could do about it.,We went there for my mother 65th birthday and it was a wonderful experience the staff were great and the food was phenomenal they did a wonderful job this is where we go for every family occasion

location_address: Taco Bell, 1500 Diamond Hill Rd, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10: The employees had a very bad attitude. My friend ordered soft taco supreme and they didn't have tomato or sour cream. That's no big deal but when we went back to fix it they were being rude about it. Worse service ever. Did they split in her food idk.,First of all that’s not even real Mexican food you want real Mexican food go to California tacos or the one on social st, they both are the best and delicious better then Taco Bell.,Do not go to this Taco Bell! How do you forget to put meats on all tacos??? Stale chicken chalupas with no chicken in them!!??? The worst experience ever!,So I've been going here for 2 years but will NEVER go here again. Ordered some tacos and burritos for me and the kids and when I unwrapped my beefy melt and was about to take a bit I look down and there is literally HAIR all over the top. Not the spray hair that's gross but happens im talking hair from floor as though they dropped it and picked it up and put it back in wrapper. I found "floor dirt and hair" on 2 of my 10 tacos/burritos. Absolutely disgusting,Literally walked in around 2pm for them to tell us we can’t dine in because woman’s room toilet was clogged.  What would that have to do with DR,  just lock the bathroom door or block it.    Just the fact that they rushed us out because they HAD to lock the door really did it for me.,Only drive through service when I went. Would have preferred to eat in with AC and use the bathroom.  But food and service were good, other than forgetting to offer hot sauce.,Place which open till 2am. If you need food late night than this is best location,It's good especially there veggie Power bowl and nachos fried and nacho fries combo box

location_address: Ocean Cafe, 114 Main St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Service & Food are always great. Only been 3x but will definitely go again. 1st time I had the white rice with habichuelas  and carne guisada, 2nd time I got pernil and yellow rice, with pollo guisado. Here's what I got this time, see photos,Good food good service. Large portions for small money. Not fancy, just delicious comfort food.,Really good Spanish food 🥑 and they serve you food like a 👑❤️😊. Very good service,Homemade Spanish food. Fair priced big servings. Good find.,The best Spanish food I have had ever,Honestly some of the best food I have eaten and the whole staff are really kind and out going I definitely recommend eating here,Great food; good prices I'll be back to eat.,Good food
Good service
Good prices 🥂

location_address: River Falls, 74 S Main St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Oh my goodness!! I was blown away at the service and the views! I felt like I was at a 5star restaurant in New York. It's been a while since I been there and wow is my word. We saw a crane fly in we sat by the water my shrimp tacos were so flavorful but careful they are spicy just ask for the boom boom sauce to be on the side. I also added avocado to mine that is extra. They are on the appetizer menu but I had them as my main corse for lunch they are big!! Definitely worth eating and buying! My mom had a build your own burger and she loved it with the side of thier AMAZING sweet potato fries.,Had a pretty good dining experience there this evening. The outdoor seating area is big and almost all of it overlooks the Blackstone River. It's really pretty and they're on OpenTable making the reservation process a breeze. Unfortunately our seats weren't near the water but we still had a great time.

My Mojito ($10) didn't have a lot of mint: it was okay but my wife's Cosmo was great. Our appetizer, the mozzarella bursts ($10) took forever to come out and were barely warm when they finally arrived. They were okay, nothing special. Our child's fish and chips however were great and came with a pretty tasty serving of tartar sauce as well as scrumptious fries. The fries were a hit with our table.

My steak tip Caesar salad was interesting. The steak tips were of good quality and delicious while the actual croutons felt cheap. Why add premium ingredients to low quality salad ingredients? Thought that was a bit odd.

My wife really enjoyed her blackened chicken Alfredo ($19.99) and it was made gluten-free for her which was great although it was under seasoned.

One other thing to note is that the tables outside appear to be plywood. There's no coating on them. Seems like a great way to get splinters. A simple coating to seal them would make a world of difference.

Overall we had a good experience here and service was great even though they were slammed with a couple of big parties. The views are great and it made for a good evening overall. There's some limited parking but worth the struggle. Just don't miss out on the fries.,A great experience!
The service was excellent and welcoming.
The backyard is incredible to sit, have a drink or eat one of the best dishes. Very recommend,First time here from Texas.. open for great food .. I had the stufffed Haddock with the Parmesan mashed potatoes and veggie risotto one word Amazingly Delicious also my hubby had the shrimp scampi just as expected great tasting food…Along with great food is great Service and topping it off with great tasting dessert… love this place it was suggested to us by the neighboring Antique Store owners … now I suggest this wonderful place with great ambient… The manager stopped by and gave us scoop on what this restaurant has previously been and also the offer the upstairs for Events and not to forget the River runs alongside making it a great place to hang outside and enjoy the view… yes they Serve Alcohol
Angie from Texas,What a surprise. first time at falls. Great old mill building right on Blackstone river. Great outdoor large patio right on river edge. Large menu selection. Very good service drinks and food. Lots of parking across street. Nice area. Several other restaurants within a block. Don't be fooled because it's woonsocket.,For anyone hoping to relive the old days of Ma Glockners… you are better off just leaving it as a found memory.   The chicken was still pretty good, but I was so disappointed with the cinnamon rolls.  The service was also very slow.,Woonsocket is a charming New England mill town with beautiful red brick buildings. This riverside Cafe is delightfully pleasant with delicious food and friendly wait staff. Calamari appetizer, baked haddock, roast beef sandwich.,The Baby back ribs were pretty good and slid right off the bone.  The River provides a natural air conditioning and beautiful view.

location_address: Broaster House, 263 Pond St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Food ordered over the phone was delivered.  Food was good, it actually tasted like the original Broaster House Chicken this time.  I paid by credit card and when the driver came, he asked me to sign my slip.  No problem until I looked at the back the order slip and it had all my credit card information on it...  No reason for the driver to have that at all.  I asked to keep it but he said I could only have the customer copy.  How strange???  I'll be checking my credit account regularly...,10 piece boneless chicken family meal, was filling for 2 people. Plenty of leftovers for another day. Chicken fingers are more like it, but expected them to be more crispy and less oily. Mashed potatoes, are instant but gravy was a tasty bonus. Pasta was, ah if you've pasta, you will not be surprised.
Overall, not bad. My expectation was for a more crispy chicken like shell on the outside and a bit dryer on the inside.
Several people inside enjoying their meals, so dine-in is available.,I can't believe this is the "best" RI has to offer. The fried chicken was bland. No seasoning at all. No coating -- just plain fried skin. The "ziti" was pasta in canned tomato sauce. No seasoning, no spices, no cheese - it was horrible. The fries were soggy and greasy. This was awful.,Good sized fish but bad news a little over a quarter of it was all batter. Super greasy, fries looked and tasted like they were dropped in oil too soon. Wife said her 1/4 chicken dinner was good.,Great Chicken cooked in there unique way all the sides are hot and fresh ,Very friendly customer service,Awesome place for family style ( all you can eat ) broasted chicken, fries, pasta and salad, Friendly staff,I'm not sure how a place that boasts its chicken can have such bad, bland, absolutely unseasoned food. The chicken was awful. Like, worse than KFC bad. There's no seasoning in their batter, and the side dishes we got were just as bad. It's truly not difficult to make decent boasted or fried chicken, even a box of instant batter will give you a much better result than whatever this was.,Just started going back. Chicken is phenomenal.  I'm going to start trying other things. Good drinks, staff and owners are awesome. They have a back room to rent and  also cater. I would give them more than 5 stars if I could

location_address: Ricks Bar & Grill, 297 Cass Ave, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Typical local neighborhood dive bar in all the great ways!  Fun, friendly staff and local crowd.   Food was delicious.,Solid full food menu, unreal fries, best prices, stiff drinks, hot bartenders that can handle the Woonsocket animals stumbling in and out. It’s like a cheaper chili’s or Buffalo Wild Wings with a pool table but the food actually tastes good,Tried comedy night on Wed. Weather was nice so it was outside, which is great (except for the loud ventilation fan).  Calzone was tasty, and good beer selection too.,I don’t ever leave reviews , But I have to just say Rick & Sarah are AMAZING in the kitchen. !! I’m addicted to the garlic burger & the famous broccoli chicken Alfredo pizza.
Absolutely amazing food !! You won’t be disappointed , also if you stop in , ask for a lemon drop shot (THE BEST),i have been going here for 2 years! Amazing customer service food is even better I'm am thankful to have them close to me!!!!,I personally love Rick's, it's a small dive with a single pool table and food round the clock. What more could you ask for if you're looking for a place to get close to someone or just have a drink and relax.,Great local bar. Good food, kitchen open late. Great atmosphere and last night they even had a bonfire outside. I would definitely go again. The patrons were very friendly and the bartender Brittany was great too!,Rick's has good pizza and good comedy on Wednesday's

location_address: Moonlight Restaurant, 32 Rathbun St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10: They aren’t too bad! Kinda wish the onion was a bit smaller/ not a chunky. Kinda overwhelms. I would say taste wise, very similar to Eats in Seekonk. I would definitely try again! Turkey Club is amazing!,Have had Breakfast here several times since moving to Woonsocket and so far it's been excellent, and extremely fast as well which is always nice. The portions seem to have gotten a bit smaller recently but due to the circumstances of the Economy and Inflation it's understandable, it's still really great food😀,Order a steak and cheese thing came a mess and moldy bread will never eat here again and highly recommend nobody else does,Table was dirty , really hot inside.  The onion rings & fries very expensive. Onion rings tasted like cooked in fish batter , barely any onion in. Barely any meat in weiners. Never again.,Its ok, and the hot dog was cheap and fast,I would have given it a zero stars if I could. I went off the menu that they handed me and and ordered 18 hotdogs and two large onion rings. It came to $51.43. On the menu it said business orders are 15% off and there was a coupon on the flyer that said orders over $40 get a free large cheese pizza. They did not honor any of the coupons and they did not honor the 15% off for a business order. I run faith and hope Ministry and it was supposed to be for a staff meeting. The customer service of the store was bad I seen them throw out four bags of hot dog rolls that were moldy away. I was told that it was an old menu after I’ve already ordered and not before. Is this even on the big bang Yuve have the hotdogs are the same price as the menu. To me this is for advertisement and I would ask send my worst enemy there.,Adorable eating experience, the owner looks out for customers. The age range of regular  I observed were around 30+. Not a typical millennial environment. They serve vegan alternative.,Prices have dramatically gone up. And new prices are not marked on their menus or posted board that is hanging up.

location_address: Patriots Diner, 65 Founders Dr, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Went in for the lobster rolls with my girl. I love the lobster rolls. Filled up and great taste. Especially the price for what you get. Especially the crispy fries. Excellent.  The thing that made the experience negative was the attitude the waitresses have given. As if they were to good to serve us for some reason. Wish they had friendlier staff. Definitely would’ve given these guys a better review.,Great family place! American fare with a Greek twist. Portions are huge and tasty.
We especially liked the spinach pie dinner and the pancakes that were as big as the moon.,Heard great things, and while meal was good, didn’t blow us away. They do have really affordable prices and it was good for a nice average breakfast. There’s also a check-in offer for $5 off on Yelp. Our server also acted like she had much better things to do and couldn’t even be nice to us. Will probably skip in the future,I love this old school diner. Breakfast is great, wait staff joyful and very attentive. Highly recommend this gem.,Great satisfaction to have breakfast in this restaurant, the food was very good and I really appreciate the service of the waitress Alicia,Tha place is clean cozy and the food is yummy and not expensive at all my waitress was nice checking on me . I will go again and you should go too,I spend a lot of money here and always satisfied for the most part but tonight took the cake. I have never seen a stuffed pepper loaded with mushy rice and a touch of hamburg. Its the other way around. Someone needs to follow a recipe. And to top it off, the girl food prepping sneezed twice, raising her arms in the air instead of covering herself. Just gross, especially in these times.,Amazing group of people that work here!! Delicious food taste and look homemade. We had meatloaf, mashed potatoes, green beans. Coffee milkshake, and mozzarella sticks with marinara and a side salad. The only 1 suggestion i have is to spin the lettuce a little more, it was still wet and the dressing wouldnt stick. The waitress was out of this world amazing. Its been a long time since i have had outstanding service like this. I will be back to visit. I hope they have blue berry pie next time.

location_address: Savini's Pomodoro, 476 Rathbun St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
This was our first time there. The experience was awesome. We ate outside all of the servers were super friendly. The prices are definitely budget friendly. We absolutely enjoyed our appetizer and our meals. We will definitely be coming back here more often.,We had our children's First Communion celebration party here and the food was delicious, as always. The staff was also very professional and prompt as well as friendly. The owners are always very nice as well. Love this place!,My husband and I recently has our wedding reception at Savini's. We originally booked in February 2020 and when we had to postpone until 2022, Charlene was so wonderful about the whole thing! She was so personable and we loved having her as our coordinator. The staff was amazing and food was delicious! the space was beautiful and perfect for our crowd. I had guests reaching out to me the days after asking for the parmesan crusted chicken recipe!,We had our reception here it was very beautiful thank you so much Charlene and Mrs. Savini you all were so great to us and we really appreciated it and enjoyed our special day spending it with great people thank you .,Had a party of about 13 people in a private room on Saturday night.
Want to praise the Guy who I did not get his name, but  he was excellent. Everything was perfect.
We all loved the food and all got different items on the menu.
He worked hard and got everything right. I would highly recommend this restaurant.  Five stars to the waiter and the Cook too.  All the rest of the staff that helped.,Haven't been there in a while.  We had the family style chicken which was very good. Came standard with fries AND roasted potatoes as well as pasta.  Salad bar was fresh and well kept and was part of the meal.  The dining room is kind of in the basement so there's not a lot of natural lighting which makes the atmosphere a bit dark.  Service was good.  Family style chicken places have quickly become scarce as the Bocce Club closed and Village Haven is changing hands as well.   Will definitely be back to Savini's,We were a party of 8 and had reservations for 6pm and at we had to chase down someone for our drinks just after 6:30.Granted it was a busy Saturday night but waiting just over a half hour and still not even a drink order? Then I had to track down the manager for bread.The young man  brought our utensils and napkins and put them in a pile on the table for us to pass around, lol. Well the food was actually very good and we have been there many times. Although others in our party have said they have always had slow service we ourselves usually go on less busy evenings. The manager came over and apologized but considering the service a drink , salad bar or even 10 percent off would have been a nice gesture. We will be back it won't be for a while.,Took my wife here for a special night out. Not what we expected. We dressed very nice because the place looked really nice and menu prices suggested a restaurant like experience. We got there and basically sat in a bar. Had typical bad bar music and had an event upstairs with loud bangs constantly through meal. Food was good. For the price point though we expected alot better.

location_address: Tacos Don Nacho, 986 Social St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
OMG Taco 🌮 Tuesday in Rhode Island. We were out in the Ocean State on Tuesday. I said hey guys let’s grab some tacos. I jumped on Google search 🔍 and found this hidden gem 💎.
Yoooooooooooo the taco’s hit the spot. The chicken 🍗 was seasoned to perfection along with the steak 🥩 , ground beef, and Chourico.

Jorge and Anthony said their burritos were BombBomb 💣. I didn’t get a chance to take a picture of their burritos 🌯. By the time I got in the car 🚗, their burritos were half-eaten.,My partner said “hey let’s stop for some tacos, I know this little place”. We stopped and I ordered 2 steak and 2 shredded carnitas tacos with everything. I chose flour over corn. It’s nice to be given a choice! For 8 tacos total, it was $24. They do take card payments! Always a plus.

Overall, they come on a paper plate with foil wrapped over them. I did enjoy them for lunch. I enjoyed the green hot sauce on the side. I wish my steak was not as chewy and on the drier side, so I took away a star. But overall, I’d order some tacos again if we are in the area!,1st time there.   got 2 hard shell beef tacos.  came on paper plates wrapped in foil.  got it home.   5 min drive and they were laying flat, soft and soggy. Nothing to write home about.
service was fast and indifferent.,Passed by going to a friends house and had to stop on way back. All 3 of us got different tacos as we figured be easier to eat on way home. Food was excellent. They have a place to sit and eat outdoors and very busy while there. Can't wait till next time in area want to stop and get the steak burritos. I heard from my friend they are excellent. If in area and hungry stop in and sit down outside and eat in your car or take home for dinner. Great selection and variety of food.,Food is excellent and the people working there are the best. Everything is made fresh in-house from scratch and so much effort is put into absolutely everything you order.

Burritos are my favorite, but the tacos are awesome as well.,Unbelievable quick stop for amazing authentic mexican food. The Chorizo is my go to option, but they have a selection of meats. The tortas are amazing. The bread and the salsa are exquisite. The nachos taste fresh. They sell Jarritos.

Also, they have a nice picnic area in the back with partial shade and a nice green overlook. Wonderful lunch date destination.,Good Mexican food. Simple some outside seating. It's a taco stand that makes good food. What more do you want?.,If you're looking for something like taco bell style tacos, covered in cheese and all that. Skip this place.

Don Nachos is 100% authentic Mexican. The real deal. Great homemade salsas, perfect meats, tortas, burritos, ceviche, tamales, menudo on Saturday morning.  It's lit kids. Don't sleep

location_address: Ye Olde English Fish & Chips, 25 S Main St, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10:
Had a great meal and great service. A++ highly recommended for fish and chips, the full  belly clams and the fries. Go have a great seafood meal! They even compped us an extra piece of fish for an unexpected delay. ❤️,Worlds Best Fish & Chips are at Ye Olde English Fish & Chips in Woonsocket, Rhode Island! Going back to the 1960's when I was a kid I been eating the Fish & Chips from Ye Olde English Fish & Chips!,Best seafood platter for the price around. Matter of fact, best seafood portion.sizes for the price around!
I got the seafood platter with Huge scallops and shrimp, nice piece of fish, and big beefy fries.
The front of the house were super friendly. Our tables were clean and they wiped between customers.
We will be back for sure!,I forgot how good they are, I won't let as much time pass between visits. Always great fish and chips or try the white chowder and clam cakes. Your gonna love it all too.,Deliciousness! We got the Captains plate and White Clam chowder. Everything was great except the chips were cold ( minus one star) we split the meal and was perfect amount for 2 of us.,I recently moved back to the area and I hadn't been to Ye Olde English Fish & Chips for more than 10 years. I was pleased to find the quality of the fish and chips here has remained as good as it always was.,I've had chicken here before but tried fish and chips for the first time. The fish portion was small and the coating was on the greasy side which made it hard to separate from the fish. The fries were soggy and mostly inedible. Disappointed.. won't get this again.,I stopped by Ye olde English fish and chips, yesterday and had a fish sandwich with tartar and fries with ketchup and malt vinegar.. yummy! I sure do miss New England's traditional foods.

location_address: Park Ave Pizza Woonsocket, 857 Park Ave, Woonsocket, RI 02895
column10: Good pizza spot. Mozzarella sticks are the best and that marinara sauce with meat is the best I’ve ever had! Chicken figures and fries is a must for an easy dinner. I do have to the say the pizza isn’t the best I’ve ever had, but definitely decent enough that everyone should at least enjoy it. Staff is friendly. Be sure to leave a tip if they deliver!!!!,Absolutely love this place. We literally eat here 3 times a week. The customer service is always amazing. We Never have any complaints..,Best pizza around Woonsocket their food is just amazing they have a big variety everything I have order from here is delicious definitely recommend,Fish and chips were fresh and well made. Clam cakes were awesome and actually had some clams in them. Came in on a whim and was completely happy. YOU NEED SOME PARK AVE PIZZA IN YOUR LIFE!,While this is not my first choice for pizza they have an excellent menu and what I have ordered was very good. The subs and sides are great.,Park Ave pizza has never disappointed. The buffalo chicken pizza is one of my faves, steak and cheese is yum, wings are sososo good ❣️❣️ I will be ordering from them more.,I have to say I have never gotten my order delivered so fast (25 min.)..the food was so hot and fresh and so good...AMAZING,Love it 😊 the pizza is great and the sales not bad. The guys are really friendly,good service.
